zh.Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭藍納可爾阿沃代爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale於1443年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie18歲，母親Elizabeth Arnot13歲。他於大約1469年與Elizabeth MacDonald在蘇格蘭費伏結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1512年9月15日在蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 苏格兰藍納可爾阿沃代爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale于1443年出生在苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie18岁，母亲Elizabeth Arnot13岁。他于大约1469年与Elizabeth MacDonald在苏格兰費伏结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1512年9月15日在苏格兰培爾培斯享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale was born in 1443, in Fife, Scotland, his father, Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie, was 18 and his mother, Elizabeth Arnot, was 13. He married Elizabeth MacDonald about 1469, in Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 15 September 1512, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale est né en 1443, à Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Arnot, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth MacDonald environ 1469, à Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1512, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale 1443 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie 18 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Arnot 13. Er hat um 1469 in Fife, Scotland Elizabeth MacDonald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 15. September 1512 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale è nato il nel 1443 nel Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Arnot, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth MacDonald circa 1469, nel Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 15 settembre 1512, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland: スコットランドラナルクシュアイアアボンダル

ja.Stirlingshire, Scotland: スコットランドスティルリングシュアイア
ja.balveny Fifeshire Scotland: スコットランドフィフ
ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandaleが1443年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphieは18歳，母Elizabeth Arnotは13歳であった。約1469年にスコットランドフィフでElizabeth MacDonaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1512年9月15日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで69歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale(이)가 1443년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Arnot(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1469년 스컷랜드 피프에서 Elizabeth MacDonald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1512년 9월 15일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale nasceu em 1443, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Arnot, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth MacDonald aproximadamente 1469, em Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1512, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale родился в 1443 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Arnot, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth MacDonald около 1469 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 15 сентября 1512 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale nació en 1443, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Arnot, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Elizabeth MacDonald aproximadamente 1469, en Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1512, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
